beats: Protagonist A peels back a corner of the newspaper.
He reveals a pencil-written message underneath.
The message reads: 'If he comes back, don't let him remember the basement.'

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 报纸下面露出一段铅笔字：如果他回来，别让他记起地下室。

prompt.positive: Extreme close-up of a handwritten pencil message on a wall, partially hidden by newspaper, man's hand peeling paper, dramatic lighting, suspense, cinematic
